vocab.meaning: sức hấp dẫn từ những điều mới lạ, kỳ lạ
vocab.example: I often prefer views in foreign lands because of their exotic appeal and the sense of discovery they provide.

vocab.meaning: sự đa dạng về địa lý
vocab.example: My own country boasts incredible geographical diversity, ranging from sun-drenched beaches to mist-shrouded mountains.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên cảm giác hoài niệm
vocab.example: The familiar landscapes of my hometown evoke a sense of nostalgia that no foreign vista can ever replicate.
When traveling abroad, I am particularly drawn to the architectural heritage reflected in the skylines of ancient European cities.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp chưa được khai phá/còn nguyên sơ
vocab.example: There is so much untapped beauty in the remote provinces of my country that many tourists have yet to see.

vocab.meaning: bức tranh văn hóa đa dạng/muôn màu muôn vẻ
vocab.example: The views in other countries are often enriched by a unique cultural tapestry that makes the scenery feel more vibrant.

vocab.meaning: vẻ huy hoàng, tráng lệ của phong cảnh
vocab.example: Whether at home or abroad, I am always on the lookout for moments of true scenic splendor.

vocab.meaning: vẻ quyến rũ đẹp như tranh vẽ
vocab.example: The small coastal villages in my country have a picturesque charm that feels very welcoming and intimate.
I feel a profound connection to the landscapes of my own country because I understand the history behind them.

vocab.meaning: điểm quan sát thuận lợi (thường từ trên cao)
vocab.example: Climbing to a high vantage point in a new country offers a fresh perspective on its unique topography.
